news.headline: Iranians rally nationwide to honour late leader Ali Khamenei
news.summary: Thousands gathered across Iran to honor Ali Khamenei, whose assassination marked the start of the US-Israeli attack.

news.summary: PM Nielsen calls Greenland a proud nation seeking to maintain global order, after US president calls it 'piece of ice'.

news.headline: Russia criminalises denial of ‘Soviet genocide’ by Nazis during World War II
news.summary:
Russia has formally designated Nazi crimes against the Soviet population during World War II as genocide and criminalised their denial, after President Vladimir Putin signed amendments to the country’s criminal code, the Kremlin said on Thursday.

news.summary:

news.headline: No, Britain Is Not Having a Christian Revival
news.summary: A study said church attendance had soared among British young people, a trend reversal that excited religious conservatives around the world. Turns out it wasn’t true.

news.summary: A section of the landmark’s original staircase will go up for auction next month and could sell for a towering sum.

news.headline: Navy Researchers Seek Volunteers for NASA Study
news.summary: Navy researchers at Wright-Patterson Air Force Base, Ohio, are seeking volunteers to assist in a study that directly supports one of the United States' biggest space exploration goals: returning American astronauts to the moon.
